title.en: The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor admonished.

content.en:
"Apprentice, let's retreat for the next period of time and try to improve my strength. Your current strength may be good, but that doesn't mean no one can kill you. In the chaos, there are too many strange strange things, and there are no such strange things in the Demon Sound Sect branch before, but it doesn't mean that there will be no in the future. If something like this happens, let alone the Demon Sound Sect, other forces may also appear such strange things. It was easy for Dao Ancestors to send one or two things in, and even other Dao Ancestors might not be able to find out in time. So, if you want to attack other forces, maybe you'll be easily targeted, you know?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor admonished.

"Yes, Master, disciples must pay attention!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Remember, don't think about destroying the Dark God Society, this force is not easy. Moreover, I felt that the power of the Dark Temple Dao Ancestor had invaded the Great Universe, and perhaps something had been sent in. The strength of the Dark God Temple is stronger than our Void Heaven One Line, and on the bright side, there are only a few Dao Ancestors in the Dark God Temple, but in fact, how many Dao Ancestors there are, and what specific Dao Ancestors there are, I don't know how many Dao Ancestors there are. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor reminded.

When Ye Tian heard this, he was taken aback.

He really wanted to destroy the Dark God Society, but now that he heard the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor say this, he immediately dispelled this idea.

The Dark God Society is not simple, if the Dao Ancestor of the Dark God Temple really sent some big killer ideas, if he goes to the Dark God Society to make trouble, maybe he will be unlucky and be killed directly, it will be too wrong.

"Let's honestly retreat and cultivate for the next few days!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Soon, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor left, and Ye Tian also stayed in the Void Heaven Hall honestly, occasionally discussing the Great Dao with the disciples of the Void Heaven Palace, and then returning to the Terran to deal with affairs, and spent the rest of the time in retreat.

Now, he had only just stepped into the half-step True Spirit Realm, and he still had a long way to go.

What he condensed was the Chaos True Spirit, which was above the Supreme True Spirit and the Supreme True Spirit, and the fusion of such a powerful True Spirit with such a powerful physical body could be far more difficult than others, so it would take a lot of time and resources.

In addition, he had just obtained the space-time shock technique, so he naturally had to practice it well.

The space-time concussion technique is a powerful divine power in the top ten of the chaos supernatural power list, and the real ranking is third, its power is very terrifying, and it is also a large-scale chaotic supernatural power.

Although Ye Tian has created four Origin Divine Powers at present, in fact, the three-element integration of Essence and Qi and Divine Unity is strictly speaking, it is a cultivation Origin Divine Ability, which can continuously grow his Essence and Divine Powers.

And the other three Origin Divine Powers are the Blood River True Body, the God Destroying Divine Power, and the Divine Power Origin Divine Power - Shenwei!

Shenwei is the use of the fluctuation of divine power, forming a kind of shock wave and gravitational wave, the power of the shock wave is very powerful, more terrible than the eternal fire, one blow is enough to shatter the Demon Sound Sect, and the gravitational wave can absorb all items, and even can divert the enemy's attack away.

Before, when he was fighting against the Demon Sound Sect, he didn't use his divine power at all, because it was unnecessary.

The True Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect couldn't threaten him at all, and there was no need for him to expose another Origin Divine Power.

But the power of Shenwei is still not as good as the space-time oscillation technique in the strict sense, and it is still slightly worse than the space-time oscillation technique.

Moreover, once he has practiced the space-time oscillation technique, he can slowly improve it according to the space-time oscillation technique and create his own space-time type origin supernatural power or concussion-type origin supernatural power.

The creation of the origin of the supernatural power is not created out of nothing, with the chaos supernatural power as a study, the probability of creation is much greater.

He was able to create four Origin Divine Powers, that is, with the help of a large number of Chaos Divine Powers, if he didn't have those Chaos Divine Powers, he would not have been able to create Origin Divine Powers.

"First practice the space-time shock technique, and then slowly complete the fusion of the half-step true spirit realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ye Tian was in retreat and cultivating, but the fact that the Demon Sound Sect was almost destroyed by Ye Tian completely detonated countless forces in the entire universe.

......

The Tower of the God of War.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden, who was already in the realm of True Monarch, was shocked when she got the information about Ye Tian.

"How is it possible, how could Wanfa Daozi almost destroy the Demon Yin Sect? The Demon Yin Sect has dozens of True Monarchs, and the strength of the Baili True Monarch is also very strong, Wanfa Daozi has just stepped into the half-step True Monarch, he can do this level, it's incredible, right? This simply breaks the cognition!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden was extremely surprised at the same time, but also frowned deeply, she always felt that Ye Tian's combat power was too abnormal.

Ye Tian was able to promote his strength with the strength of the Nine-Star Peak God, coupled with the increase in transcendent strength, even if he was more powerful than her, he would not be too powerful.

Moreover, she also cultivated the Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level at the Heavenly Monarch level, and she also practiced several Chaos Divine Powers, even if Ye Tian cultivated a lot of Chaos Divine Powers, but no matter how many Chaos Divine Powers there were, it only made herself have no defects, and the increase in strength would not be too large.

Therefore, no matter how amazing Ye Tian's potential is, at most his strength is twice as strong as her.

She is at the strength of the half-step True Spirit Realm, and when she encounters the Baili True Monarch of the True Monarch realm, she will definitely be killed in one move.

Baili Zhenjun is not an ordinary Zhenjun, he used to be a nine-star god general!

How could such a powerful True Monarch be inferior to Ye Tian in the half-step True Spirit Realm?

Moreover, Ye Tian entered the Demon Sound Sect alone, facing the power of the entire Demon Sound Sect, what kind of exaggerated strength does this need?

"Could it be a strange thing with increased combat power?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden guessed that this was the only possibility.

There were many people who guessed the same as the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, and they all guessed that Ye Tian had a strange thing in his hand that increased his combat power, and it was not an ordinary strange thing, but a top-notch strange thing.

Soon after, a rumor broke.

Ye Tian has a top-level strange object in his hand, which can increase his combat power by up to 20 times.

At this moment, the secret about why Ye Tian was so powerful came out, and no one was curious anymore, but they were all afraid of Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian was already very powerful, and with such a top-level strange thing, he was definitely one of the most unprovoked people in the great universe

With the passage of time, the Demon Sound Sect gradually recovered, although it was far less than before, but as long as there was a hundred miles of true monarch, the Demon Sound Sect could recover to a certain scale sooner or later.

And Ye Tian's strength is also growing steadily, the degree of integration of the physical body and the true spirit is getting higher and higher, and the space-time shock technique has finally been practiced, and his strength has increased again.

In a flash, tens of millions of years have passed!
